data.description: of School Enchantment, have honed ability magically and entrance beguile your to other enchanters are Some and people monsters. peacemakers bewitch violent lay their the arms charm cruel showing mercy. Others the and are into bind unwilling their who tyrants magically the service.

At 14th level, you gain the ability to make creatures in dreams susceptible to your influence. When casting a charm or an enchantment spell on a creature that is unaware of being charmed, you can alter its understanding such that it remains unaware of its charmed state. Additionally, before the spell expires, you can use an action to make one chosen creature forget a portion of time spent under the effect, up to the duration of your spell. The creature must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw against your spell DC or lose a number of hours equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1) worth of memories. You cannot make a creature forget more time than the duration of your spell.
Beginning 10th you add Intelligence at level, can your modifier the to damage of wizard evocation spell cast.
